sources.evidence: Google’s verified profile result identifies @autopharge as Autopharge – Band and the profile describes the act as 'hard heavy mostly fast psych punk rock'; this matches current Melbourne venue and media listings.
The Auto Pharge channel identifies itself as the band’s channel, contains five Autopharge performance videos and describes the uploads as 'Autopharge - Melbourne Music'.
The official channel’s Videos page showed Couch Jesus at 64 views, ahead of Whose Crisis (51), Aches and Dreams (49), Culture Claws (41) and Black Coffee (38).
Triple R’s current Melbourne event profile describes Autopharge as high-energy, guitar-driven chaos with massive riffs, pounding drums and poetic screams about modern existence.
Musick lists Autopharge as a Melbourne artist and corroborates the active band identity and live performance history.
